calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignmenet Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Apr-05-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Debra Lew, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.7888, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.
Phyllis Voisenat, Esq., of the Law Offices of Phyllis Voisenat, Tel. 510.272.9410, appearing for Defendant and opposing party.

After hearing, PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Assignment Order And Turnover Order was granted in part and denied in part. Judge Pro Tem: Anthony Schoenberg; Not reported.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
